description: CompositionWhite V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a pouch and graphic print on the front FittingRegular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Bring out your dainty, feminine side with this white graphic tee from jealous 21. The graphic of the girl on the front speaks of the innate sweetness of all women. Team this tee with denim shorts, or faded jeans and a pair of stylish shoes from myntra's wide international range for an outing with friends and look cool all the way. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
